senses.gloss: soldiery; armed forces; the military, the army, the troops
a type of administrative division, sometimes translated as “military district”, notably instituted by the Umayyad Caliphate

etymology.text: Borrowed from Aramaic גּוּדָא (guddā) / ܓܘܢܕܐ (gundā), from Middle Persian gwnd (gund, “army, troop”).
